block='Other recent terminal sessions (OTHER windows, not this one — most recent
first). These are separate from your own conversation history above. Only
use them when the user EXPLICITLY refers to work done in another window
(e.g. "redo the folder task from the other terminal"). An implicit
reference like "them", "these", or "that" means THIS session's own recent
activity, never these. If a summary line is too thin to actually redo the
task, call read_session with its [id] to see that session in full:
- session f4a2 (just now, in /home/docs): create a folder for each year 2020 to 2026
'
